passages.text:
You were sent here by someone who cares about you. This is a **short allyship interview** — not a form that grades you, and not therapy.

We use it so **Bruised Banana** stewards can shape **real support** (including a future **Support** campaign hub) without guessing what you need.

**Invitation, not extraction** — skip anything that feels like too much; your inviter can catch the rest in conversation.

**Bruised Banana** is a residency-shaped campaign: creative practice, mutual aid, and an **honest economy** (time, money, space — all optional, all visible).

You're not being sold anything. If you only read one thing, use the wiki.

- [Campaign on the wiki](/wiki/campaign/bruised-banana)
- [The four moves](/wiki/moves)
We'll move in small steps. Pick the line that fits **closest** — there's no wrong answer.

choices.label: Work or income just shifted hard (layoff, firing, forced change)
Something else heavy landed (health, family, housing, grief)
I'd rather not name it — take me to the next questions

passages.text:
**What would help** if allies showed up well?

You're choosing **tone**, not signing up for tasks yet. Stewards and your inviter can follow up for specifics.

Think: witness, practical help, advocacy, introductions, rest.

choices.label: Mostly **witness** — see me without fixing me
**Advocacy / network** — intros, letters, showing up beside me
**Mixed** — I need more than one kind of help

passages.text:
**Boundaries** keep solidarity trustworthy. What should people **avoid** — even with good intentions?

If nothing here fits, tell your inviter in your own words.

choices.label: Don't share my story publicly without consent
Don't flood me with advice — ask before solving
Don't ghost after one nice gesture — I need follow-through
I'll name boundaries directly with my inviter

passages.text:
**Thank you.** What you chose here is enough to **start**. Stewards can **water** this signal into a **Support** campaign (hub + spokes) when the field is ready — with **urgency** framed as care, not panic.

Sign up if you want tools, quests, and the vault. You can always return to the hub and events without owing the room anything.

ending.description: Thunder intake v1 — branch choices are qualitative signal until ECI persists structured answers.
